seoTitle: Hartley Vale vs Hartys Plains — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hartley Vale and Hartys Plains. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hartley Vale vs Hartys Plains: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hartley Vale and Hartys Plains.
heading: Hartley Vale vs Hartys Plains — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hartley Vale, New South Wales and Hartys Plains, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hartley Vale has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Hartys Plains (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hartley Vale or Hartys Plains safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hartley Vale has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Hartys Plains scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hartley Vale scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Hartys Plains scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hartley Vale or Hartys Plains?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hartley Vale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.12% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
